calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2015 Off Calendar

Hearing On Plaintiff'S Request For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LOREN M. LOPIN, TEL. NO. 200-4592 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Hearing On Plaintiff'S Request For Right To Attach Order - The motion for right to attach order and issuance of writ is granted. The requirements for obtaining a writ of attachment are: (1) the claim upon which the attachment is based is one upon which an attachment may issue; (2) plaintiff has established the probable validity of the claim; (3) the attachment is not sought for a purpose other than recovery of the claim upon which the attachment is based; (4) the amount to be secured by the attachment is greater than zero. (CCP 484.090(a); See California Retail Portfolio Fund GmbH & Co. KG v. Hopkins Real Estate Group (2011) 193 CA4th 849, 856; Cal. Prac. Guide Civ. Pro. Before Trial Ch. 9(II)-D.) In the case at bar, the claim is one for money, is over $500, is unsecured, and is a commercial claim. It is more likely than not that Plaintiff will obtain a judgment against Defendant because the parties have entered into a valid legal agreement and Plaintiff is seeking enforcement of the agreement. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR # 5963
